summary: Re-equitization, the perfect SpaceX pop, Ken Griffin and Nubank’s non-liquidation.

title: SpaceX IPO in Focus as Iran Fears Ease | The Asia Trade 6/12/2026
title_cn: 伊朗担忧情绪缓解，SpaceX 首次公开募股成为焦点亚洲贸易 6/12/2026
summary:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Holds Gain as Trump Touts Reopening of Hormuz This Week
title_cn: 特朗普吹捧本周重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，金价保持上涨
summary: Gold held a gain after US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz could reopen on Friday, likely easing an energy and inflation shock that has roiled global markets.

title: Asia Traders Turn Focus to RBA, BOJ Rate Decisions: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲交易员将焦点转向澳洲联储和日本央行利率决定：市场总结
summary: Traders in Asia turned their focus to policy calls from the Reserve Bank of Australia and the Bank of Japan after a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz fueled a relief rally across global financial markets on Monday.

title: IG4 Offers to Buy Raizen Debt in Quest for Majority Stake
title_cn: IG4 提出购买 Raizen 债务以寻求多数股权
summary: Private equity firm IG4 Capital, fresh off a deal to take control of petrochemical giant Braskem SA, is now setting its sights on sugar and ethanol producer Raizen SA, another major Brazilian company in distress.

title: Trader Loses $1 Million on Cabo Verde’s Stunning World Cup Tie
title_cn: 佛得角令人惊叹的世界杯比赛让交易员损失了 100 万美元
summary: A single trader on Polymarket lost nearly $1 million when Cabo Verde fought Spain to a stunning draw on Monday in one of the most unlikely outcomes in recent World Cup history, powered by a 40-year-old goalkeeper who left the pitch in tears.

title: Oil Holds Decline as Traders Seek Clarity on Hormuz Reopening
title_cn: 交易员寻求霍尔木兹海峡重新开放的明确消息，油价保持下跌
summary: Oil held its biggest drop in more than two weeks as traders, shippers and producers awaited details of a US-Iran deal that’s intended to pave the way for the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Bolivia Tells Investors FX Unification, IMF Deal Coming Soon
title_cn: 玻利维亚告诉投资者外汇统一和国际货币基金组织交易即将到来
summary: Bolivia told investors it is close to agreeing on a financing program with the International Monetary Fund, likely after introducing a floating exchange rate to end a dollar peg that has been in place for more than 15 years.

title: Waste Management of Canada Sells C$700 Million of Bonds
title_cn: 加拿大废物管理公司出售价值 7 亿加元的债券
summary: Waste Management of Canada sold C$700 million ($500 million) of notes on Monday, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Montreal’s REM Raises C$1.85 Billion in Four-Part Bond Sale
title_cn: 蒙特利尔 REM 通过四部分债券发行筹集 18.5 亿加元
summary: The Réseau express métropolitain (REM), a light rail system in Greater Montreal, raised C$1.85 billion ($1.32 billion) in a bond sale, according to people with knowledge of the deal.

title: MSG Should Split Into Two Companies, Ariel's John Rogers Says
title_cn: Ariel 的约翰·罗杰斯表示，MSG 应拆分为两家公司
summary: John Rogers, Ariel Investments founder, chair, CIO and co-CEO,  says MSG stocks have not reflected the value of the Knicks or the Rangers during an interview with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Where the US, Israel and Iran Stand on a Deal to End Months of War
title_cn: 美国、以色列和伊朗在结束数月战争的协议上的立场
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, we examine the major hurdles facing a proposed US-Iran peace deal, including how Israel fits into the equation.

title: What the US-Iran Peace Deal Means for the Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美伊和平协议对霍尔木兹海峡意味着什么
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf. Most of this energy can only be exported aboard tankers that cross the Strait of Hormuz — a waterway that’s effectively been closed for more than three months since the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran in late February.

title: Elanco CEO: Screwworm Easier To Manage Than Contain
title_cn: Elanco首席执行官：螺旋虫比遏制更容易管理
summary:
Jeff Simmons, Elanco Animal Health President & CEO, discusses the emerging threat of screwworm infections spreading beyond the initial control zone in Texas, with at least 12 confirmed cases including eight heads of cattle. Simmons reassured viewers that while the pest is expected to spread, it can be managed effectively through current interventions such as the release of sterile flies to reduce the screwworm population. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."



 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Bonds Rally as Traders Trim Fed Rate-Hike Bets on Iran Deal
title_cn: 由于交易员削减美联储加息对伊朗协议的押注，美国债券上涨
summary: Treasuries mostly advanced as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to halt the Iran war.

title: Blackstone’s Ancestry Hires Bank of America for $2 Billion Loan
title_cn: Blackstone 的 Ancestry 聘请美国银行提供 20 亿美元贷款
summary: Ancestry.com Inc. is weighing a $2.25 billion loan deal to refinance some of its existing debt with the help of Bank of America Corp., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Nvidia Joins AI Borrowing Frenzy With $25 Billion Bond Sale
title_cn: Nvidia 发售 250 亿美元债券加入 AI 借贷热潮
summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. sold $25 billion of high-grade bonds, joining a wave of jumbo debt offerings from tech heavyweights as investors clamor to get exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Canada’s BCE Cuts 1% of Jobs as It Focuses on AI, Network Build
title_cn: 加拿大 BCE 裁员 1%，专注于人工智能和网络建设
summary: Canadian telecommunications company BCE Inc. is cutting hundreds of jobs, reducing costs as it plans major investments in its US internet and artificial intelligence businesses.

title: Markets Rally on Hope for US-Iran Peace Deal | Closing Bell
title_cn: 市场因美伊和平协议的希望而上涨|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Rally on Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz; SpaceX Gains
title_cn: 美国股市因重新开放霍尔木兹海峡协议而上涨； SpaceX 收益
summary: US stocks rose sharply after the US and Iran reached an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices lower and easing concern about inflation ahead of Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chairman of the Federal Reserve this week. SpaceX shares advanced 20%, helping boost risk-on sentiment.

title: Shippers and Oil Giants Seek Clarity on US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 托运人和石油巨头寻求美伊和平协议的明确性
summary: A US-Iran deal intended to reopen the Strait of Hormuz within days left many of the world’s top shipowners, traders and oil producer nations seeking clarity about the terms of the pact that’s pivotal to the global economy.

title: Worst of US Inflation May Be Over If Iran Peace Deal Sticks
title_cn: 如果伊朗和平协议得以坚持，美国最糟糕的通胀时期可能已经过去
summary: The peace agreement between the US and Iran, if it holds, suggests the worst of the war-driven inflation has likely passed, but the outlook for American consumers and the broader economy remains far from certain.

title: UBS' Falconio Pushes Out Expectations for Fed Rate Cut
title_cn: 瑞银集团(UBS)的法尔科尼奥(Falconio)推翻了美联储降息的预期
summary: UBS Head of Taxable Fixed Income Strategy Leslie Falconio says pressure on the Fed to hike rates is easing now that the US and Iran have reached a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. She has now pushed out her call for a rate cut in 2027.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wafic Said’s Al Shams Accuses Braemar Hotels of Self-Dealing
title_cn: 瓦菲克·赛义德 (Wafic Said) 的阿尔·沙姆斯 (Al Shams) 指责布雷马酒店进行自我交易
summary: Businessman Wafic Rida Said has criticized Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. over a series of recent transactions that he says amount to “a brazen act of self-dealing,” according to a letter sent to the real estate investment trust.

title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Spurs Slide in Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议刺激石油下滑，股市上涨：市场结束
summary: A deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz spurred a rally in riskier corners of Wall Street, with stocks climbing alongside cryptocurrencies as oil sank on hopes the war that has jolted markets is close to an end.

title: SpaceX IPO Stress Tests Crypto’s Bid to Reinvent Stocks
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 压力测试加密货币重塑股票的努力
summary: For years, crypto firms have argued that blockchain technology could create markets for private companies long before they reach Wall Street. SpaceX provided the industry’s biggest test yet. The results were mixed.

title: SpaceX Surges 20% in Second Day to Add $412 Billion in Value
title_cn: SpaceX 第二天飙升 20%，市值增加 4120 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu puts Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fox to Buy Roku in Streaming Video Push; Shares Tumble
title_cn: Fox 收购 Roku 进军流媒体视频领域；股价暴跌
summary: Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku Inc. in a deal with an enterprise value of about $22 billion, creating a new television juggernaut and marking a big push into ad-supported streaming.

title: S&P 500 Set for Best Day Since April as Oil Sinks | The Close 6/15/2026
title_cn: 石油下跌，标准普尔 500 指数将迎来 4 月份以来最好的一天收盘价 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Goldman Sachs Chief Equity Strategist & Managing Director Ben Snider, Teneo Global Chair, Political Risk Advisory Kevin Kajiwara, Ariel Investments Chairman, Co-CEO & Chief Investment Officer John Rogers, Kestra Chief Investment Officer Kara Murphy, PIMCO Head of Public Policy Libby Cantrill, Elanco Animal Health CEO Jeff Simmons, & Rapper N.O.R.E & DJ EFN. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada to Restrict Use of Personal Data for Custom Prices
title_cn: 加拿大限制使用个人数据来确定定制价格
summary: The Canadian government is proposing stricter privacy rules that would limit businesses from using personal data to charge consumers higher prices, while giving individuals more power over their own information.

title: Goldman-Backed Go to Debut After Biggest Japan IPO This Year
title_cn: 高盛支持的今年日本最大IPO后首次亮相
summary: Taxi-hailing app provider Go Inc.’s shares will start trading on the Tokyo Stock Exchange on Tuesday, testing investor sentiment after the nation’s largest initial public offering so far this year.

title: Studios in Microsoft’s Xbox Division Brace for Closures
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 部门的工作室准备关闭
summary: The studios, which include Compulsion Games and Double Fine, are in active negotiations with Xbox and may be given the chance to go independent.

title: Rieder Says No Forward Guidance Is a Good Thing
title_cn: 里德表示没有前瞻性指引是一件好事
summary: Rick Rieder, BlackRock global fixed income CIO, says if the new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh eliminates forward guidance, it will be good for markets. He speaks about how other changes Warsh makes could impact stocks, the state of private credit and where he sees the price of bitcoin heading. He appears on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Disables AI Access for Foreign Nationals | Bloomberg Tech 6/15/2026
title_cn: Anthropic 禁止外国人使用人工智能 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why Anthropic disabled access to its most advanced models for all foreign nationals after a request from the Trump administration. Plus, Nvidia is seeking to raise at least $20 billion from its first corporate bond sale since 2021. And, SpaceX shares throttle up on day 2 of trading, adding to a blockbuster public markets debut on Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's AI Markets Still 'A Source of Funds' Says Citigroup
title_cn: 花旗集团称中国人工智能市场仍是“资金来源”
summary: Alicia Yap, Citi's head of Pan-Asia Internet Research, breaks down where China's tech market stands amid global AI adoption. But despite all this heavy corporate activity, Citigroup warns that global investors are still treating China tech as "a source of funds," with Wall Street dumping local stocks to fund the global AI hardware trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Stocks Still Volatile, Says JPMorgan Strategist
title_cn: 摩根大通策略师表示，SpaceX 股票仍然波动
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management global market strategist, says to expect SpaceX volatility in the next six months. She also says they are expective some big high-profile AI names, but the IPO markets are still going to be selective. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Capable of Building Orbital Data Centers, Says Former Meta CTO
title_cn: 前 Meta 首席技术官表示 SpaceX 有能力建设轨道数据中心
summary: Mike Schroepfer, former CTO of Meta and founding partner of Gigascale Capital - a venture firm making early-stage bets on companies focused on climate impact - says SpaceX is the only company capable of building orbital data centers. He also shares how ocean data centers are 100x cheaper than orbital ones. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cohere Seeing Inbounds After Washington's Anthropic Scrutiny
title_cn: 在华盛顿的人性审查之后，科赫看到了界外球
summary: Cohere Chief AI Officer Joelle Pineau says Cohere has seen a huge number of inbounds after Anthropic was ordered by the US government to disable access to its most advanced AI platforms for all foreign nationals, with governments and investors alike now seeking non-US models as Washington steps up its AI oversight. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is Anthropic’s Mythos AI and Why Was It Blocked?
title_cn: Anthropic 的人工智能神话是什么？为什么它被封锁？
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant released Mythos to only 200 partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Polymarket Traders Clash Over $345 Million Iran Peace Market
title_cn: Polymarket 交易商争夺价值 3.45 亿美元的伊朗和平市场
summary: A proposed deal to end hostilities between the US and Iran gave equities and bond traders a measure of relief on Monday. It also left prediction markets with a new headache.

title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space
title_cn: 太空数据中心建设竞赛
summary: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce to Buy AI Firm That Handles Customer Service
title_cn: Salesforce 将收购处理客户服务的人工智能公司
summary:
Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.
Fin’s flagship product, AI Agent, handles customer queries via chat, email, WhatsApp, text message, phone and Slack. Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst Anurag Rana joined Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Tech
title_cn: 彭博科技
summary: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Traders Turn Bullish on US Stocks Citing Peace Deal
title_cn: 摩根大通交易员因和平协议而看好美国股市
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s trading desk has turned bullish on stocks following optimism that peace in the Middle East is near.

title: Anthropic Set to Meet Trump Officials Over AI Security Concerns
title_cn: Anthropic 将就人工智能安全问题与特朗普官员会面
summary: Anthropic PBC executives are planning to meet with Trump administration officials on Monday to discuss an unprecedented US government directive barring foreign access to the company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Chainguard, Cyber Firms Use AI to Hunt for Open-Source Flaws
title_cn: Chainguard、网络公司使用人工智能寻找开源缺陷
summary: More than two dozen companies including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and an array of cybersecurity firms are collaborating to remedy software flaws spotted by cutting-edge artificial intelligence models.

title: Fox Will Buy Roku In Deal Worth About $22 Billion
title_cn: 福克斯将以价值约 220 亿美元的交易收购 Roku
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence media analyst Geetha Rangananthan says this deal makes a lot of strategic sense because it gives Fox more of a gateway into streaming.  The acquisition will create the third-largest player in the US television market by share of viewing, spanning broadcast, cable, local and streaming, the companies said. She appears on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Industrials Stocks Erase War Selloff, Hit Record on US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 工业股消除战争抛售，美伊协议创历史新高
summary: Shares of large US industrial companies jumped to a record Monday after the US and Iran said an interim peace deal was reached, raising hopes that the energy crisis threatening manufacturers’ and transportation firms’ profits will recede.

title: Nuveen Private Bond Chief Scoops Up AI’s ‘Picks and Shovels’
title_cn: Nuveen 私人债券负责人挖掘人工智能的“镐和铲子”
summary: Data centers and computing chips are all the rage in global credit markets right now, but Nuveen LLC’s Laura Parrott is more excited about the “boring, plain vanilla” infrastructure on the outskirts of AI that will benefit regardless of how the technology pans out.

title: Roku-Fox Deal; Airlines Move Higher | Stock Movers
title_cn: Roku-Fox 交易；航空公司走得更高 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Roku (ROKU) is higher while Fox (FOX) is declining on news Fox agreed to acquire Roku in a deal that values the streaming video platform at about $22 billion including debt.

- United Airlines (UAL) is surging with airlines stocks up around 4% ahead of the open after the U.S. and Iran reached an interim peace deal.

- Coinbase (COIN) and Robinhood (HOOD) are following Bitcoin higher amid broader risk appetite with the US-Iran interim deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Whole Foods Unionization Upheld By US Labor Board
title_cn: 美国劳工委员会支持全食超市成立工会
summary: The US labor board ruled against Whole Foods Market’s objections to a landmark Philadelphia unionization vote, teeing up a likely yearslong legal battle over whether the Amazon.com Inc. grocery chain must collectively bargain with US employees for the first time.

title: Anthropic Shuts Down Mythos Access After US Order
title_cn: Anthropic 在美国命令后关闭 Mythos 访问
summary: The US Commerce Department imposed export controls on June 12 restricting Anthropic from offering its most advanced AI models to foreign nationals. In response, Anthropic announced it would halt access to these models for all users, citing the impracticality of policing usage on a case-by-case basis and noting that many of its employees are foreign nationals who would also be affected. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Looks to Raise $20 Billion in First Bond Sale Since 2021
title_cn: Nvidia 计划自 2021 年以来首次发行债券筹集 200 亿美元
summary: Nvidia is preparing to raise at least $20 billion through its first corporate bond sale since 2021, marketing bonds across seven tranches with maturities ranging from two to thirty years, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prime Radiant Invests $50 Million in Cellares Pre-IPO
title_cn: Prime Radiant 在首次公开募股前向 Cellares 投资 5000 万美元
summary: Upstart private equity firm Prime Radiant Partners is investing $50 million in Cellares, as the biotechnology company making high-tech robots to mass-produce cancer treatments raises money ahead of a potential initial public offering in 2027.

title: Adani, Jabil Alliance to Build AI Data Center Gear in India
title_cn: 阿达尼、捷普联盟将在印度建设人工智能数据中心设备
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s group has partnered with American engineering company Jabil Inc. to manufacture AI data center equipment in India as it seeks to capitalize on the country’s artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Short-Term Iran Deal to Pave Way for More Talks | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/15/2026
title_cn: 伊朗短期协议为更多谈判铺平道路权力平衡：最新版 06/15/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Rep. Dina Titus (D-NV), says President Trump's deal with Tehran shows the administration "could have done all of this through diplomacy." Ukrainian Ambassador to the US Olha Stefanishyna says the US deal with Iran allows leaders to "fully concentrate" on Russia's war in Ukraine at this week's G7 summit, where Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is expected to meet with President Trump. Retired General Wesley Clark, former NATO Supreme Allied Commander Europe and former Commander for US Southern Command, says the US should keep aircraft carrier groups in the Middle East through the 60-day negotiation period with Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US B-52 Bomber Crashes in California Shortly After Takeoff
title_cn: 美国 B-52 轰炸机起飞后不久在加利福尼亚坠毁
summary: A US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base in California on Monday, the Pentagon said.

title: Key Republican Expresses Optimism on Trump Attorney General Pick
title_cn: 关键共和党人对特朗普司法部长人选表示乐观
summary: President Donald Trump’s nomination of Todd Blanche to lead the US Justice Department was met with cautious optimism by a key Republican senator who has repeatedly split with the administration on other issues.

title: Ret. Gen. Clark: US Must Not Give Up Iran Leverage Too Soon
title_cn: 退休。克拉克将军：美国绝不能过早放弃对伊朗的影响力
summary: Retired General Wesley Clark, former NATO Supreme Allied Commander Europe and former Commander for US Southern Command, says the US should keep aircraft carrier groups in the Middle East through the 60-day negotiation period with Iran, warning that Washington's leverage will fall once forces depart. Clark also discusses the role of US military assistance in Ukraine's war against Russia. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Anti-Graft Group Seeks Free Meal Halt, Wider Probe
title_cn: 印度尼西亚反腐败组织寻求免费用餐并进行更广泛的调查
summary: Indonesia should suspend President Prabowo Subianto’s signature free meals program and significantly widen a graft probe into the project, according to one of the groups that first brought alleged corruption in the initiative to light.

title: Ambassador Stefanishyna: Iran Deal Clears Path for Ukraine Focus at G7
title_cn: 斯特凡尼西娜大使：伊朗协议为七国集团聚焦乌克兰扫清了道路
summary: Ukrainian Ambassador to the US Olha Stefanishyna says the US deal with Iran allows leaders to "fully concentrate" on Russia's war in Ukraine at this week's G7 summit, where Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is expected to meet with President Trump. Stefanishyna outlines the importance of US support, calling air defense and missiles for Patriot systems "absolutely vital" for Ukraine, and expresses confidence Ukraine can move quickly toward European Union membership. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Second Day of Trading, US at Odds With Allies | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/15/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 交易第二天，美国与盟友发生争执彭博商业周刊日报 6/15/2026
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Tyler Kendall, Bloomberg News Washington Correspondent on the latest on the peace agreement the US and Iran are expect to sign. They also speak with Jason Draho, UBS Chief Investment Office Head of Asset Allocation on market reaction. And, Bailey Lipschultz, Bloomberg News IPO Reporter and David Bauer, JPMorgan Head of ECM Americas talk about the current IPO climate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Titus on Iran Deal: US Has 'Not Come Out Ahead'
title_cn: 众议员提特斯谈伊朗协议：美国“没有领先”
summary:
Rep. Dina Titus, a Nevada Democrat and member of the House Foreign Affairs and Transportation Committees, says President Trump's deal with Tehran shows the administration "could have done all of this through diplomacy," arguing the main issues behind the Iran conflict remain unresolved and the US is "worse off than before." She also says she would "not necessarily" support an extension of Section 702 of FISA if Jay Clayton is confirmed as director of national intelligence without further reassurances on privacy protections. She speaks with Kailey
Leinz on the late edition of "Bloomberg's Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arson Attacks Targeting Keir Starmer Linked to Russia, BBC Says
title_cn: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 称，针对凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 的纵火袭击与俄罗斯有关
summary: A series of arson attacks last year targeting UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer are linked to an extensive campaign of sabotage and provocation by Russia, the BBC reported.

title: Bolivian Blockades Start to Recede After 46 Days of Unrest
title_cn: 玻利维亚的封锁在经历 46 天的动乱后开始解除
summary: Road blockades that led to food and medicine shortages across Bolivia have begun to recede after 46 days in a conflict that tested the new president’s staying power.

title: How the US and Iran Might Spin Their Deal to End the War
title_cn: 美国和伊朗可能如何达成结束战争的协议
summary: On the Big Take podcast, Sarah Holder and Bloomberg’s National Security Editor, Nick Wadhams, discuss the US-Iran ceasefire deal and how Israel’s fight with Iran’s proxies fits into the equation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK to Announce Fresh Russia Sanctions, Ukraine Energy Support
title_cn: 英国将宣布新的俄罗斯制裁，乌克兰能源支持
summary: The UK said it would impose fresh sanctions on Russia and extend further energy support to Ukraine, as Prime Minister Keir Starmer and his European allies seek to increase pressure on Vladimir Putin and encourage US President Donald Trump to push for new peace talks to end the conflict.

title: Newsom Accuses Trump of Ordering DOJ to Investigate Him
title_cn: 纽瑟姆指责特朗普命令司法部调查他
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom accused President Donald Trump of ordering the US Department of Justice to investigate him and his wife, Jennifer Siebel Newsom.

title: PIMCO’s Cantrill: Geopolitical Risk Not off the Table
title_cn: PIMCO的坎特里尔：地缘政治风险并未排除在外
summary: Libby Cantrill, PIMCO Head of Public Policy, discussed the recent developments in negotiations involving Iran, emphasizing that what has been achieved is more of a detente than a comprehensive deal. She highlighted the uncertainty surrounding key issues such as Iran’s nuclear program, funding of proxies, and the stance of regional players like Israel. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romania Prime Minister Designate Defies Party to Seek Government
title_cn: 罗马尼亚候任总理不顾党派寻求政府
summary: Romania’s prime minister-designate, Adrian Vestea, said he will seek support from other pro-European forces for his government in an attempt to break weeks of political deadlock despite opposition from the majority of his own Liberal Party.

title: JD Vance Becomes Face of Trump’s Iran Deal — and Its Risks
title_cn: JD 万斯成为特朗普伊朗协议的代言人 –及其风险
summary: Owning the end to a war could boost the vice-president’s 2028 chances, or crush them.

title: Trump at G7 Hails Iran Deal as Divisions With Tehran Remain
title_cn: 特朗普在七国集团上赞扬伊朗协议，但与德黑兰的分歧仍然存在
summary: The White House sought to make the case that its interim deal with Iran will end a global energy crisis and achieve the administration’s wartime goals, even as the two adversaries diverged on what the agreement will look like.

title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Disable Foreign Access to Mythos
title_cn: 美国政府命令 Anthropic 禁止外国访问神话
summary: Bloomberg's Maggie Eastland breaks down what's at stake as Anthropic shut down its Mythos Fable 5 model after the US government issued a directive blocking foreign nationals from accessing the artificial intelligence tool.  Eastland said that what was pitched as a voluntary AI security program by Trump administration, now seems to leave Anthropic with no choice but to comply with government directives. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Reach Hormuz Deal | Balance of Power 6/15/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗达成霍尔木兹协议 |权力平衡 6/15/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Kailey Leinz discusses the latest news from the Middle East. On today's show, McCain Institute Executive Director Evelyn Farkas, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Rapidan Energy Group President Bob McNally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Netanyahu Pays a Political Price for Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡为特朗普的伊朗协议付出政治代价
summary: Benjamin Netanyahu has staked his political future on his ironclad relationship with Donald Trump — but that’s become a liability now that the US president has cut a deal with Iran that much of Israel opposes.

title: Bolsonaro Says Ex-Caixa CEO to Join Campaign as Economic Adviser
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗称前储蓄银行首席执行官将作为经济顾问加入竞选活动
summary: Brazil presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro said the former head of Caixa Economica Federal is joining his campaign as an economic adviser, fueling expectations that she could become finance minister if he is elected.

title: US at Odds With Allies Over How Easy It Is to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国与盟友就重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的难易程度存在分歧
summary: US President Donald Trump keeps repeating that the Strait of Hormuz — through which one fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supplies normally flow — will reopen by Friday.

title: Ukraine and Moldova Start EU Membership Talks After Delay
title_cn: 乌克兰和摩尔多瓦推迟入盟谈判
summary: The European Union opened membership talks with Ukraine and Moldova after the new Hungarian government dropped its opposition, kickstarting a process that will likely take years to complete.

title: US, Iran to Sign Peace Deal in Switzerland on Friday
title_cn: 美国和伊朗将于周五在瑞士签署和平协议
summary: President Donald Trump says the Strait of Hormuz will be open by Friday. Officials say the US and Iran are due to sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday. For now, Trump is still at the G7 in France. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Secret Service Testing Face-Scanning App to Probe, Stop Threats
title_cn: 特勤局测试面部扫描应用程序以探测、阻止威胁
summary: The US Secret Service has begun using a face-scanning mobile phone application similar to a tool that federal immigration agents have for months wielded to identify people as part of a mass deportation effort.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz Strait This Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗本周达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US and Iran reached an interim peace agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and move further toward ending a 15-week war that’s wrought chaos across the Middle East and reverberated through the global economy.

title: SpaceX Euphoria Meets Geopolitical Relief
title_cn: SpaceX 的欣喜与地缘政治的缓解相结合
summary: SpaceX extends its post-IPO rally, while airline stocks take off as the US-Iran strike an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to break down the latest moves in aerospace and airlines. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Hormuz Wil Be Completely Opened on Friday
title_cn: 特朗普称霍尔木兹海峡将于周五完全开放
summary: US President Donald Trump says the Strait of Hormuz is already partially opened. He speaks during a bilateral meeting with French President Emmanuel Macron. (Source: Bloomberg)
